scripts.pretest: docker compose down -v --remove-orphans 2>/dev/null; docker compose up -d --wait && sleep 2
scripts.test: S3_REGION=us-east-1 S3_ACCESS_KEY=dev_access_key S3_SECRET_KEY=dev_secret_key S3_ENDPOINT=http://localhost:9000 S3_FORCE_PATH_STYLE=true node --test --test-timeout 120000 test.js
